mapper.update: update patient set is_del = 1 where id = #{patientId}
mapper.select: select r.id from cga_record r where r.patient_id = #{patientId} and r.del_flag = '0' order by r.create_time desc, r.id desc limit 1

select report.patient_id, report.case_no, report.name, report.gender, report.height, report.birthday, report.age, report.phone, report.id_card, report.address, report.record_id, report.user_id, report.total_score, report.result, report.suggest, report.create_time, report.update_time, report.scale_id, report.scale_name, report.scale_code, report.scale_total_score, report.remark, report.raw_score from ( select p.id as patient_id, p.case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, timestampdiff(year, p.birthday, curdate()) as age, p.phone, p.id_card, p.address, p.update_time, r.id as record_id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.result, r.suggest, r.create_time,
s.id as scale_id, s.scale_name, s.code as scale_code, s.total_score as scale_total_score, s.remark, coalesce(sum( case when json_type(json_extract(r.answer_json, concat('$."', q.id, '"'))) = 'OBJECT' then cast(json_unquote(json_extract(r.answer_json, concat('$."', q.id, '".score'))) as signed) else cast(json_unquote(json_extract(r.answer_json, concat('$."', q.id, '"'))) as signed) end ), 0) as raw_score from cga_record r left join patient p on r.patient_id = p.id left join cga_scale s on s.del_flag = '0' left join cga_question q on q.scale_id = s.id and q.del_flag = '0' where r.id = #{recordId} and r.del_flag = '0' group by p.id, p.case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, p.phone, p.id_card, p.address, r.id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.result, r.suggest, r.create_time, s.id, s.scale_name, s.code, s.total_score, s.remark ) report order by report.scale_id
